name: vite
purpose: Development server and production JavaScript bundle builder for the browser game.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view vite@8.0.16 license repository.url time --json` reported license `MIT` and repository `git+https://github.com/vitejs/vite.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Vite is the selected build tool in PLAN.md and AGENTS.md and is a widely used modern frontend build tool.
